title: Creature Feature
description: Features 11 unique Hostile Creatures in various parts of the game
body:
Here are the following Creatures, Featured in this mod. Careful, for the Feature of the Creatures is divided into 4 sections, with more to come.
Eventually:tm: A fabric port will happen.
# The Galenic.
### **Minds**, The Unthinking Undead 
A zombie with an oversized brain, enrages when hit.
![A sunset. Minds is standing in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05b45d5cf26cc0e79c9ff504276bcb3e4c3d0f3c.png)
~~I wonder if you could pop it...~~

Appears in warm biomes, such as Savannahs, drops the same things you'd expect for a zombie to drop. With some poisonous lead if _Oreganized_ is installed.

### **Sinister**, The Mirror, rirroM
A  mass of silver tarnish, holding a mirror that reflects damage.
![A cave. Sinister's mirror is almost  taking up the entire screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb7c3afafc38033a7de2e289474b1e6efa20f44.png)
~~What if you hit the mass itself?~~

Appears in deep caves, drops the mud it's made of and Silver, if _Oreganized_ is installed.

### **Beauty**, The Beauty.
A lanky humanoid plant, seems to shrug off all attacks by parrying them.
![Two beauties approaching the player in an unilluminated lush cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5acc45e11fccd85e13c5b6b1232d1243116afde1_0.webp)
~~What if you hit it while it's parrying another attack?~~

Appears in Lush caves, drops moss.

### **Machination**, The Raging Machine.
A small, electrum golem(?) which attacks by kicking you. Can wind up a flying kick if far away enough.
![Two machinations approaching each other in a warped forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359c5bc55a8a7dedc68513e6f13a8f08ce3dae48.png)
~~And sometimes leaps directly into the lava below.~~

# The NeverEnding.
**All of these creatures and their features appear in the End.**
### **Eeper**, Whom dreams forever.
A distant relative of the creeper. Hops and scotches and marches directly towards you. Makes you fall asleep (slower speed, no jump, forced 3rd person) if it explodes.
![2 Eepers. one in the front and one in the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6094f47baf6c9d051e4dc577d7a088ca0018f1a5_0.webp)
### **Blitz**, Whom does not retreat.
An elemental of. Something? Some thing. often leaps, dealing damage around itself and then dashes backwards or strafes.
![Blitz moving to the left. afterimages can be seen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c51823f0a99bfcda868a01164054654a8b949288.png)
### **MinedFlayer**, Whom floats without worry.
A cosmic jellyfish, thinking of nothing. Floats around, floats to you if it spots you.
![Minedflayer floating above an end island.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc9b2046422f4d665c2a53ff23a8a53ec8d3e4f5_0.webp)
Doesn't deal any substantial damage, only disorienting you by rotating your camera and moving the player.
### **NoThing**, Whom.
![nothing here. (Blurred image with a faint sillhouette)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/357b0733dff609566a1502a2b50e8ffb347091b7_0.webp)
<details>
<summary>The description is empty.</summary>
Upon spotting a player, it shouts, revealing itself for a moment, then runs towards the player.
It also becomes revealed upon getting hit or getting close to the target.
</details>

# The Untamed.
### **Vertigo**
**A Sickened goat(?) equine(?) pig(?) deer(?)**.
![Vertigo charging up the spit attack in a dark forest near a river.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77796761d2234b8db977705576ba549b9cd1def2.png)

Appears in dark forests, rarely in taigas. Charges towards the player as a regular walking enemy would. Rarely Sneezes(Spits?) at the player, knocking them back if caught in the attack cone and applying damage over time.
### **Canary**
**A Metallic lion(?) snake(?) bird(?) object(?)**.
![a canary in a cave charging at the camera.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b23986091c91feb9efb0ea6fe9690dd625a51cf.png)
Appears in very deep caves. Circles the player and tries to hit them with it's face plate (mask?). Inflicts delayed health loss, alongside simple melee damage.
The tail segments deal minimal damage to YOU, but the Canary takes full damage if those are hit.

# The Friendful.
### **Fiend**, a Fully Fiendish Fella.
Appears in Nether wastes, kicks blocks at the player while approaching to attack in close range. Sometimes may carry a skeleton.
![An image of a fiend walking to the right, nether wastes are in the background ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b8cfef2bc7a84b7cceb7b587d52085f19f0041_0.webp)


Try moving to the left or right to avoid the punted blocks.
